Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/jmbrinamojsgfkfwgsce/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_a31437a46b52dea40e9e1d63cc5e632282cae9f6' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"insert into plans \(id, client_id, title, status, workouts, nutrition, explanation\) values \('\\''plan_1'\\'', '\\''c_1'\\'', '\\''Spring Fat-Loss Programme'\\'', '\\''approved'\\'', array['\\''Upper Body Strength \(Barbell\)'\\'','\\''HIIT Cardio'\\'','\\''Lower Body + Core'\\'','\\''Active Recovery'\\'','\\''Full Body Conditioning'\\''], array['\\''Moderate deficit: 2,100 kcal'\\'','\\''High protein: 180g, moderate carbs: 150g'\\'','\\''Pre-workout window: banana + coffee'\\'','\\''Post-workout recovery meal'\\'','\\''Rest day: 1,800 kcal with 160g protein'\\''], array['\\''Phase 1 focuses on metabolic priming and building work capacity.'\\'','\\''Protein set at 1.8g/kg to preserve lean tissue during the deficit.'\\'']\) on conflict \(id\) do nothing; insert into plans \(id, client_id, title, status, workouts, nutrition, explanation\) values \('\\''plan_2'\\'', '\\''c_2'\\'', '\\''Marathon Build Phase 1'\\'', '\\''draft'\\'', array['\\''Easy Run 8km'\\'','\\''Tempo Intervals'\\'','\\''Strength & Mobility'\\'','\\''Long Run 18km'\\'','\\''Recovery + Cross-Training'\\''], array['\\''High carb: 320g for training days'\\'','\\''Race day carb loading protocol'\\'','\\''Post-run protein window: 30g within 60min'\\''], array['\\''Base building phase — 80/20 polarized training model.'\\'']\) on conflict \(id\) do nothing; insert into plans \(id, client_id, title, status, workouts, nutrition, explanation\) values \('\\''plan_3'\\'', '\\''c_3'\\'', '\\''Trial Starter Pack'\\'', '\\''approved'\\'', array['\\''Full Body Assessment'\\'','\\''Light Movement'\\'','\\''No plan — awaiting upgrade'\\''], array['\\''Balanced: 2,000 kcal, 150g protein'\\''], ARRAY[]::text[]\) on conflict \(id\) do nothing"}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('habits:', len\(d.get\('habits',[]\)\), 'completions:', len\(d.get\('habitCompletions',[]\)\), 'sub:', d.get\('subscription'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('habits:', len\(d.get\('habits',[]\)\), 'completions:', len\(d.get\('habitCompletions',[]\)\), 'subscription:', d.get\('subscription'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('client:', d['client']['fullName'], '| habits:', len\(d.get\('habits',[]\)\), '| completions:', len\(d.get\('habitCompletions',[]\)\), '| sub:', d.get\('subscription',{}\).get\('status'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('notes count:', len\(d.get\('notes',[]\)\), '| first note:', d['notes'][0]['content'][:60] if d.get\('notes'\) else 'none'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://lwnmxtvqakffycowbxnx.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/exec -H 'apikey: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imx3bm14dHZxYWtmZnljb3dieG54Iiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImV4cCI6MTk4MzYzNDIwMn0.VxkDnV7rA8irKJfTu7hgE_lG-53qN1V4h7h6wY_bCqY' -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imx3bm14dHZxYWtmZnljb3dieG54Iiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImV4cCI6MTk4MzYzNDIwMn0.VxkDnV7rA8irKJfTu7hgE_lG-53qN1V4h7h6wY_bCqY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"args": {"sql": "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_notes \(id text PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT '\\''cn_'\\'' || gen_random_uuid\(\)::text, coach_id text NOT NULL REFERENCES coaches\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE, client_id text NOT NULL REFERENCES clients\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE, content text NOT NULL, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW\(\), updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW\(\)\)"}}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('notes:', len\(d.get\('notes',[]\)\), '| first:', d['notes'][0]['content'][:60] if d.get\('notes'\) else 'none'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d\), 'records | first:', d[0]['weightKg'], 'kg @', d[0]['measuredAt'][:10]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d\), 'records | weight:', [r['weightKg'] for r in d]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('check-ins:', [\(r['id'], r['progress'].get\('adherenceScore','MISSING'\)\) for r in d]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d['client']; print\('goal:', c.get\('goal'\), 'health:', c.get\('healthConditions'\), 'supplements:', c.get\('supplements'\)\)")
